h3: Andrew Griffith MP Member of Parliament for Arundel and South Downs
text_excerpt: Contact Me | Andrew Griffith MP Skip to main content Andrew Griffith Member of Parliament for Arundel & South Downs Main navigation About Andrew News My Priorities In Parliament Sign up to my newsletter Angel Inn Reconstruction Survey Contact Me Andrew Griffith Member of Parliament for Arundel & South Downs Contact Me Tweet How you can contact me Before contacting me, you should check that this is a matter your Member of Parliament can actually deal with. There are some details here. If you are a constituent – please check here first – please write to: Andrew Griffith MP House of Commons Westminster London SW1A 0AA Alternatively, you may wish to send me an email: [email protected] You MUST include your full name, full address and postcode in every email as Members of Parliament may only correspond with their own constituents. Do check the spelling carefully – a misspelt email address is the most common reason why constituents occasionally say they have not had a reply. Note - do not include links in your email as I will not open these for security and your message is highly likely to end up in the Parliamentary spam filtering system. Small PDF attachments (under 1Mb) generally are ok. Contact Me Newsletter Sign Up Form Check who is my MP What can an MP do?
